name: house-modeler
description: Digitize a building from hand-drawn or photographed floor plans into accurate 2D plans (SVG) and an interactive walkable 3D model (Three.js) from one source of truth — geometry in millimetres. Covers walls/doors/windows, area calc, interior furnishing to clearance standards, site/plot, levels, sun by latitude, and roofs. Includes a friendly interview for non-technical users.
